arts.ttl: Arsenal learn new price tag for Newcastle ace Alexander Isak
arts.sum: Alexander Isak remains a player in demand, but the Newcastle star is unlikely to be moving to Arsenal after his new transfer fee was revealed. The Swedish attacker is in a rich vain of goalscoring form at the moment, having scored 12 goals in his last 10 games (WhoScored), and provided three assists. arts.ttl: Donyell Malen transfer the beginning of the end for one Aston Villa favourite
arts.sum: Either Ollie Watkins or Jhon Duran will end up leaving Aston Villa as competition for places in Unai Emery’s squad intensifies. “I personally think one of Jhon Duran or Ollie Watkins will move eventually – which one that is, I’m not too sure,” he told BetBrain .

arts.ttl: Bailey starts, Malen debut call: Aston Villa starting XI vs Arsenal predicted
arts.sum: Villa predicted XI vs Arsenal: Martinez, Cash, Konsa, Mings, Digne, Kamara, Onana, Bailey, Tielemans, Rogers, Watkins. arts.ttl: Talks ongoing to sign Aston Villa player – He’s confessed love for club, selling him a dream
arts.sum: River Plate are hoping they can use several factors to their advantage and seduce Emi Buendia to join them from Aston Villa. That’s according to MDZ, who report that Buendia is being targeted as a replacement for Pablo Solari. A report yesterday indicated Buendia is a target for River. arts.ttl: Transfer news and rumours: Willian to Everton, Kelechi Iheanacho to Leeds, Emiliano Buendia to River Plate
arts.sum: Sports Mole rounds up the latest transfer news and rumours, including Willian to Everton, Kelechi Iheanacho to Leeds United and Emiliano Buendia to River Plate.

arts.ttl: Liverpool's surprise complication hands Arsenal hope to deliver overdue Premier League drama
arts.sum: Liverpool are top of the Premier League but Arsenal have renewed hope they can go one better than last year after finishing behind Man City

arts.ttl: Diego Carlos transfer twist after Newcastle stance made clear
arts.sum: The window for Turkish clubs to do their transfer business opened on Monday and Fenerbahce are now entering the final round of talks with Villa to secure Carlos, as per Fabrizio Romano. Fenerbahce are reportedly closing in on a deal with Aston Villa to sign defender Diego Carlos.

arts.ttl: Kai Havertz: Arsenal legend slams "fickle" critics of Gunners striker amid goalscoring struggles
arts.sum: Arsenal legend Ray Parlour jumps to the defence of Gunners striker Kai Havertz, hitting out at "fickle" people for their criticism of the Germany international.
